common.heroFooter: Authentication, onboarding, and address setup in one shared experience.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Access your account to load favorites, history and settings.
signIn.heroTitle: The fastest way to order again.
signIn.heroDescription: Access favorites, orders, address details, and your entire customer experience from a single session.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.description: Sign up to save orders, favorites and preferences.
signUp.heroTitle: Your next order starts with a ready profile.
signUp.heroDescription: Create a customer account to save favorites, addresses, and orders without starting over on every visit.
signUp.phoneError: Enter a valid Costa Rica phone: +506 and 8 digits.
signUp.successFallback: Registration completed. Check your email to confirm your account.

callback.title: Finishing authentication...
callback.heroTitle: One moment, we are wrapping up your access.
callback.heroDescription: We are syncing the external provider session with your customer experience so we can take you back into the app without manual steps.

descriptions.itemized: Each person only pays for what they ordered. Taxes and delivery fees are split proportionally to consumption.
descriptions.equal: The exact total is divided into equal parts among all cart members.
descriptions.custom: Assign manual amounts to each person. Useful when someone wants to cover part of the bill.

sinpe.title: Collect with SINPE
sinpe.subtitle: Share the summary with your friends
sinpe.organizerInstructionsBody: Use the buttons to copy the message or send it directly by WhatsApp to each participant.
sinpe.messageTemplate: Hi {participantName}! Your share of the FastEat order is {total}. Please send it by SINPE to {hostPhone} under the name {hostName}. Thanks! 🍣🍱
